title: Pige clean-room visual comparison and correction ledger
status: active UI Design review; not production fidelity evidence

reference_boundary.reference: Observable ChatGPT-branded Codex desktop client behavior and user-provided screenshots
allowed: Measured pane geometry, spacing, typography scale, grayscale, radii, icon geometry, motion, focus behavior, and state hierarchy
Independent Pige HTML, CSS, SVG geometry, copy, product behavior, and brand assets
prohibited: Third-party JavaScript, CSS, component source, private bundle code, brand artwork, fonts, or proprietary icons
Claims that route availability, manual inspection, or a prototype screenshot proves production implementation

rules: Compare only equivalent content, locale, state, viewport, and scale factor.
Mask native traffic lights, antialiasing-only glyph edges, and dynamic timestamps before image difference.
A surface is locked only after geometry, color, typography, icon, state, keyboard, reduced-motion, and narrow-window checks pass.
Any remaining P0 or P1 discrepancy keeps the overall visual target open.

iconography_evidence.common_family: Lucide 1.17.0 geometry confirmed from open-source modules in the inspected bundle
semantic_checks: Pin needle and shoulders are optically centered.
Settings is a gear and cannot be confused with Appearance palette or System sun.
Shell, navigation, content actions, Settings, and capability rows use one outline family.
Every icon-only control keeps its accessible name on the owning button.

keyboard_patterns_verified: Library tabs: ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End update focus, selection, controls, and panel label
Selection toolbar: ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End move focus without triggering an action
Intermediate Library drawer: Escape closes the drawer and restores focus to the sidebar toggle
Independent Settings surface: Tab and Shift+Tab remain inside the surface and wrap at both ends
Compact Note Agent at 400 and 760 px: Tab and Shift+Tab remain inside the open drawer; the overlay contract extends through 1111 px
Appearance and restore-mode radio groups: arrow keys move and select with one Tab stop
Current-action confirmations: focus starts on the safe deny action and resolves to one focused terminal status
Home model listbox: ArrowUp and ArrowDown move among models, Escape closes it, and selection reports connected or unavailable truth
Home processing files: disclosure reveals exactly five 44 px rows before internal scrolling; pause, continue, and remove retain named actions
Knowledge Tree: pointer or Enter selects and zooms one named treeitem; directional keys move selection and focus among nearby nodes
focus_return_verified: Escape closes the compact Library sidebar and returns focus to the titlebar sidebar toggle
A successful Library retry moves focus from the removed failure action to the restored search field
A successful Knowledge Tree retry moves focus from the removed failure action to the restored first knowledge node
First-run vault, model, and restore step transitions move focus to the newly visible step heading
Closing Note Agent returns focus to the reader toolbar toggle
Opening Note Agent moves focus to the note composer after the panel transition
Escape closes the compact Note Agent and returns focus to the reader toolbar toggle
Permission and model-egress decisions move focus to the single body-free terminal status
Model selection and Escape return focus to the composer model switcher
Removing a processing row returns focus to the next row's remove action; removing the current summary item retains the summary action
semantic_patterns_verified: Primary and Settings navigation expose the current page with aria-current
Safe drafts and bounded progress use polite atomic status regions
Current-action decisions and typed failures use assertive body-free regions
Task rows expose named progressbar values and collapsed task content becomes inert, aria-hidden, and hidden after its exit motion
Supported source-format glyphs are a named informational list with zero nested controls
Appearance and restore identity choices use named roving radio groups
Knowledge Tree exposes 169-262 individually named treeitems across four deterministic data distributions; search results supersede stale branch dimming
remaining: Complete spoken screen-reader announcement and assembled platform text-rendering review.

measured_browser_evidence.note: At taller viewports Settings reaches its 820 px cap; at 720 px it retains a 24 px safe inset without overflow. Wide three-pane review remains bound to the 1536 x 1024 target viewport.

knowledge_tree_baseline_capture.human_visual_review: corrected after user reference comparison; user re-review pending

prototype_baseline_encoding: JPEG emitted by the approved in-app browser capture surface; use for human visual review, not lossless pixel-color truth

remaining: Capture equivalent reference and prototype states at the same device scale, then bind the masked difference result.
Bind the final pixel overlay after production fonts and platform chrome are fixed.
Lock sidebar row rhythm, icon optical weight, and titlebar seam with an overlay.
Keep the verified 400 and 760 px drawer focus containment in regression.
Lock Markdown line wrapping, heading baselines, table density, and note-agent composer alignment by overlay.
Below 1112 px the Library rail and Note Agent degrade to independently controlled drawers; at 1112 px and above the Library rail remains resident when the user leaves it open.
Lock family tabs, result rows, empty state, and search field by overlay.

checks.manual_visual: corrected after reference comparison; user re-review pending

remaining: Obtain user acceptance on the corrected botanical silhouette, then lock branch opacity, node density, label baselines, and floating detail surface by equivalent-state overlay.
Measured light/dark settings surfaces and the 275 px sidebar are locked; row rhythm, typography, separators, and control alignment still require equivalent-content overlay evidence.
Verify scroll ownership and non-clipped actions at the minimum supported viewport.

open_p1: Complete spoken screen-reader and assembled platform rendering audit
overall.decision: The prototype is broad and interactive, but the pixel-fidelity objective remains open.

fixed_during_review: Three-pane content clipped below its combined fixed rail width.
Narrow reader collapsed into a zero-width grid column.
Settings exceeded a short viewport by eight pixels.
Reader initialization stole focus and showed an unsolicited blue focus ring.
Narrow reader breadcrumb and secondary toolbar actions crowded the title row.
Long localized selection actions escaped the 400 px viewport.
The 760 px narrow breakpoint misclassified the exact 680 px expanded Home as an overlay; the corrected 679 px boundary preserves 280 + 400 px side-by-side geometry at 680 px.
Custom Provider protocol selection exceeded its narrow Settings row because of intrinsic select width; the control now shrinks to the row at 400 px in all six locales.
At 760 px the fixed Note Agent rail was pushed outside the reader window; 680-1111 px now uses the same bounded overlay drawer and focus-containment model as compact widths.

A preserved sidebar state selected a higher-specificity 960 px note width inside a 760 px viewport; the reader is now fixed to 680 px with a 280 px overlay sidebar and zero horizontal document overflow.
Opening a note at 680-1111 px automatically opened the Note Agent over the reader; it now stays closed until explicitly requested, then returns focus to the reader control on Escape.
Switching notes reopened a manually hidden resident Note Agent; note routing now preserves both sidebar and Note Agent disclosure while updating the active document.

The canonical fresh ?screen=note route contradicted its three-pane name by omitting the sidebar; fresh wide note-family entries now default to three panes while fresh compact entries keep both overlays closed.
Escape incorrectly dismissed a resident sidebar at 1112-1439 px; it now dismisses only compact overlay panels.
Escape closed the compact Library drawer while leaving focus inside hidden navigation; focus now returns to the titlebar sidebar toggle after the exit transition.
A successful Library retry dropped focus to the document body after removing the failure card; the restored search field now owns focus.
A successful Knowledge Tree retry dropped focus to the document body after removing the degraded card; the restored first node now owns focus.

Knowledge Tree used a fixed sparse radial graph that contradicted the botanical reference and could not reflect changing knowledge data; it now grows deterministically from stable semantic directions, maps weight/count/evidence to trunk width, canopy density, node size/color, and has been exercised with four mock distributions.
Knowledge Tree search reported matches while the previous selected branch dimmed all of them; an active query now supersedes branch dimming and clearing the query restores selection context.
First-run transitions hid the invoking choice or restore action without a focus successor; the new step heading now receives programmatic focus without a visual outline.
The 400 px intermediate reader broke the breadcrumb into vertical glyphs; the path now stays on one line and progressively hides earlier segments and secondary actions.
